title: ACI Contract Hit/Miss Ratio Analysis
spl:
index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:contracts"
| timechart span=1h sum(permit_count) as permit sum(deny_count) as deny by contract_name
| eval miss_ratio=round(100*deny/(deny+permit+0.001),2)
description: Complements raw contract hits (UC-18.1.4) with **permit vs deny/miss** ratios over time to catch mis-tuned filters and unexpected drops before workloads fail.
value: Complements raw contract hits (UC-18.1.4) with **permit vs deny/miss** ratios over time to catch mis-tuned filters and unexpected drops before workloads fail.
implementation: Poll contract counters on the same interval as UC-18.1.4. Alert when `miss_ratio` jumps vs 24h baseline for business-critical contracts. Map `contract_name` to owning team.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Install and configure the required add-on or app: `TA_cisco-ACI`, APIC contract statistics.
• Ensure the following data sources are available: `sourcetype=cisco:aci:contracts` or APIC API contract stats.
• For app installation, inputs.conf, and Splunk directory layout, see the Implementation guide: docs/implementation-guide.md

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Poll contract counters on the same interval as UC-18.1.4. Alert when `miss_ratio` jumps vs 24h baseline for business-critical contracts. Map `contract_name` to owning team.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Run the following SPL in Search (then save as report or alert; adjust time range and threshold as needed):

```spl
index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:contracts"
| timechart span=1h sum(permit_count) as permit sum(deny_count) as deny by contract_name
| eval miss_ratio=round(100*deny/(deny+permit+0.001),2)
```

Understanding this SPL

**ACI Contract Hit/Miss Ratio Analysis** — Complements raw contract hits (UC-18.1.4) with **permit vs deny/miss** ratios over time to catch mis-tuned filters and unexpected drops before workloads fail.

Documented **Data sources**: `sourcetype=cisco:aci:contracts` or APIC API contract stats. **App/TA** (typical add-on context): `TA_cisco-ACI`, APIC contract statistics. The SPL below should target the same indexes and sourcetypes you configured for that feed—rename `index=` / `sourcetype=` if your deployment differs.

The first pipeline stage scopes events using **index**: cisco_aci; **sourcetype**: cisco:aci:contracts. That sourcetype matches what this use case lists under Data sources.

**Pipeline walkthrough**

• Scopes the data: index=cisco_aci, sourcetype="cisco:aci:contracts". Cross-check against **Data sources** above so indexes and sourcetypes match your ingestion.
• `timechart` plots the metric over time using **span=1h** buckets with a separate series **by contract_name** — ideal for trending and alerting on this use case.
• `eval` defines or adjusts **miss_ratio** — often to normalize units, derive a ratio, or prepare for thresholds.


Step 3 — Validate
Confirm that events are present in the index and that the search returns expected results. Compare with known good/bad scenarios if applicable. Verify field extractions and index permissions.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Add the search to a dashboard or set up alert actions (email, webhook, PagerDuty, etc.) as required. Document the use case in your runbook and assign an owner. Consider visualizations: Line chart (permit vs deny), Single value (miss ratio %), Table (worst contracts).
visualization: Line chart (permit vs deny), Single value (miss ratio %), Table (worst contracts).
